resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having an alternative link if the primary link fails. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or checks regarding the existence of an alternative link in the event of a primary link failure. The linked use case only details the creation of a primary Zoom meeting link without addressing the fallback mechanism, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an alternative link being provided if the primary Zoom link fails.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
